sessionStart.prompt: Repo: afenda-Xerp (pnpm + turbo). Apps: apps/erp (3000), apps/docs (3001). Governance: AGENTS.md + .cursor/rules/ (env: env-workflow.mdc; package CSS dist: package-css-dist-sync.mdc; coding session: afenda-coding-session.mdc). Skills: .cursor/skills/ — invoke /afenda-coding-session for full coding standard; /package-css-dist-sync after package CSS edits. Every coding turn: announce skill, state Phase 0 contract before edits, end with Phase 2 Completion Report. Use pnpm only. Env: edit .env.config / .env.secret only, then pnpm env:sync && pnpm env:doctor. Package CSS: edit src only, then pnpm sync:package-css-dist (apps import dist/). Hooks guard shell/MCP/env/CSS policy and run scoped stop quality gates. Prefer typecheck, pnpm check, and tests over starting dev servers.
